title: /api/health returns degraded with HTTP 200; all status-code consumers blind to degraded

routed.what: knb/smackerel/home-lab/verify.sh + shared observability alerting should adopt GET /api/health?strict=true (503-on-degraded) or parse the JSON status field; out-of-repo (knb).
Align dev docker-compose.yml core healthcheck (still /api/health) with docker-compose.prod.yml + deploy/compose.deploy.yml decision; liveness-target consistency.

notes: In-repo, non-destabilizing part done: opt-in ?strict readiness signal on /api/health (default 200 liveness contract unchanged). Consumer adoption (verify.sh in knb) + healthcheck-target alignment routed. Requires redeploy to expose the new query param on prod.
